title: Agent Manifest (agent.yaml)
description: Schema for agent.yaml: the canonical agent definition metadata. Used for agent-definition targets in agentquilt.config.yaml. Provider adapters may enforce additional output-specific constraints without changing this neutral schema.

description.description: Human-readable purpose of this agent. Required by the neutral schema; provider adapters may impose stricter requirements. The Codex adapter rejects descriptions that are blank after trimming.

name.description: Optional agent name. Defaults to the agent directory name if not provided.

oneOf.description: Shorthand tier. Resolves to concrete model per platform via modelTiers in agentquilt.config.yaml. 'inherit' omits the model field from generated output.

reasoning.description: Model reasoning effort (if supported by the platform).

model.description: Model configuration: tier shorthand or expanded object. Optional.

permissions.description: Permission level for this agent. Defaults to 'read-only' if not provided. Maps to tool sets or API access levels per platform.

additionalProperties.description: Platform-specific extension blocks are accepted by the neutral schema and validated by their adapters. The Codex adapter requires nonblank description and developer instructions. It accepts x-codex.nickname_candidates only as a non-empty unique array of trimmed strings containing ASCII letters, digits, spaces, hyphens, and underscores. It accepts x-codex.skills only as an object with a required config array whose entries require a nonblank string path and permit an optional boolean enabled. Canonical fields, mcp_servers, malformed values, and unknown keys are rejected by that adapter.
